feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Date . . contains invalid character ,infotype 2 is incorrect in slg1 .
entry.content:
While Integrating  the employee data from SF to S4Hana , for only few employee the errors are popping  in the SLG1 transaction, stating that the the " Date .. contains invalid character and info type 2 is incorrect . Kindly help on the above.

 

Thanks & Regards .

entry.title: cross tab and non aggregated tab in story reports table
entry.content:
what is cross tab and non aggregated tab in story reports table. In which scenario's do we use it ?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: What are SAP SF AI Features?. SAP Business AI
entry.content:
Is there any learning path or roadmap for SF AI features or those are just the inbuilt AI-enhanced features in the SF Talent Modules that are to be enabled as per requirements?

Thanks

entry.title: Client level number range task
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task to check the client-level number range assignment. For example, a company XYZ has 19 entities, from A to S. The requirement is that when Company A hires an employee, the personnel number should be 1. If Company B hires an employee, the personnel number should be 2, and so on. This numbering process should also apply to organizational objects, such as position, job, and task. Could you guide me on how to set up this configuration in SAP HCM?

Regards,

Anna

entry.title: Possibilities of Cost Center
entry.content:
Hello! I'm new to SAP HCM and have been assigned a task involving an employee who works for different organizations. The requirement is to assign cost centers from different companies with specific percentages, meaning 30% of the cost will be covered by Company A, 65% by Company B, and 5% by Company C. Could you guide me on how to configure this in SAP HCM?

Regards,

entry.title: PA_SE_IN please could you advise when the latest pack will be released
entry.content:
We would like to do support pack upgrades with the latest PA_SE_IN. when does this get released. also the last versions of 

SFIHCM01

SFIHCM02

SFIHCM03

entry.title: Regarding HR module
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We are implementing FI, SD , MM  modules by using Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)  for one of our clients. This is migration project where we are migrating from ECC system to S4 HANA.

Now our client wants to implement HR modules which will be suitable with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) therefore need your assistance.

  1. Can we add HR module with Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud)?
  2. Do we need to pay separate license cost ?
  3. What is the different between Grow with SAP S4 HANA (Public cloud) and successfcators?

Thank You, 

Rini Mukherjee 

+91-9038870937

entry.title: Help needed in HR forms WT1000 (Working hours) cumulating please!
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am stuck in an implementation where I am working on how the payslip shows wage type 1000 data. In Forms it gets cumulated into single line. Business expects it to come as individual lines i.e., for each date. In RT table it comes as single lines, but in form it is coming as single line. I already changed V_512W_D PC30 value to 0.

Tcode: PC00_M08_CALC_SIMU 

Below are entries of RT table:

There are two entries for current period in RT table as below (Wagetype 1000):

 total (8 + 5 = 13)

Same for previous period(retro) it also has two entry:

total (8 + 3 = 11)

But when form is displayed it gets added as single line, see below:

 

PS: I dont have much idea about hrforms. Kindly help as this is urgent.

Thanks,

Rahul

entry.title: HCM integrates with which other functional modules like MM,PP,SD,ETC...?And in which senerios?
entry.content: HCM is integrate with officially FICO but what about others! Try to explain with example.

entry.title: Absence Quota Credit _Time Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have one scenario kindly help me with solution.

** An Employee has joined the company, for the first year he/she will not get any paid leave, from second year he/she will get 6 leave annually which will be credit on monthly basis(Means 0.5 for each month) and it should be carry forward every year.

Kindly let me know end to end to configuration.

Thanks in advance !!

Regards,

Vikas

HCM (Human Capital Management) SAP ERP HCM Time Management

entry.title: When a customer has a WZ question, where can a CSP ask?
entry.content:
Customer Scenario 
We are going to be implementing service now and I want to see how it can integration into a “one-stop” portal for different things. I know it primarily a PM tool, but it looks like it can integration several things into one portal.

entry.title: How can PA2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.
entry.content:
Hi,

All emplyees' IT2001 for one of absent subtype has been replaced with another absent subtype and that have effected the whole payroll for the month.

How can IT2001 be reinstate to previous state when IT2001 get changed mistakenly of all emps.

Please Help out in this matter.

How can we remove this replacement with the original absent subtype when we are not sure for each employee which subtype has been replaced with a specific absent subtype.

It means Replaced Leave Subtype is unknown and with which it is replaced is known.

Now, need to correct that Info Type 2001 for all employees, so that the Payroll can be matched with the Simulation that generated earlier to this change.

How, can I retrieve History of IT2001 and then how can I replace the effected Subtype?

entry.title: HCM Time Transfer Creation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently creating a new time transfer and time types to capture the beginning and end balances for the grouping of absences.

My question:

In PT40, after running PT40 and doing multiple selection for cumulative balance I get the below result. However, the Beg Balance disappears randomly in different periods for multiple PERNR:

First Example of Z262 Disappearing Randomly:

PERNR, Period, Time-Type, Time Type Description, Number

00112 202309 Z261 XYZ Benefit Correction 480.00
00112 202309 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 0.00
00112 202309 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202310 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202310 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202311 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202311 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202312 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 480.00
00112 202401 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202402 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202403 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202404 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
00112 202405 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 480.00
 
 
Second Example of Beg Balance Z262 disappearing:
PERNR, Period, Time-Type, Time Type Description, Number
11111 202108 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 0.00
11111 202108 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 80.00-
11111 202109 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 80.00-
11111 202109 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 168.00-
11111 202110 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 168.00-
11111 202110 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202111 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202111 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202112 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202112 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202201 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202201 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202202 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202202 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202203 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202203 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202204 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202204 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202205 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202205 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202206 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202206 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202207 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202207 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202208 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202208 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202209 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202209 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202210 Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance 272.00-
11111 202210 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202211 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202212 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202301 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202302 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202303 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202304 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202305 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202306 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-
11111 202307 Z263 XYZ Benefit End Balance 272.00-

Does anyone know why Z262 XYZ Benefit Beg Balance disappeared?

Thank you for your help HCM Experts!

BL

entry.title: Generate Absences based on Holiday Calendar
entry.content:
We have a requirement where the user will maintaint  the holiday calendar at the beginning of the year. After which they will run time evaluation to generate absences based on the maintained date of the holiday calendar.

For example on 01.01.2025 they will maintain a holiday on 30.05.2025, they will run time evaluation on 01.01.2025 and the absence record will be generated for with the date 30.05.2025. 

Considering of using PCR that read the holiday class of the date, but as far as i know PCR for time evaluation can only read past dates and not future date.

Thank you

entry.title: CL_GUI_TEXTEDIT - Event on Change Text
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to register an event concering changing the content of a text editor (class CL_GUI_TEXTEDIT)?

Thanks a lot in advance,

Best regards

Reinhold

entry.title: SAP New Hire Reporting RPLNHRU0
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to include zoo code last four digits and the contact number for the employer to this new hire report, but the table T5UTL did not work for us. This info goes at the end of every new hires record inside the report output.

Thanks,

Sanjeev Sinha

entry.title: Renaming of Query Name in AdHoc Query
entry.content:
Is it possible to rename the Query Name and Query Text in AdHoc Query?

Appreciate a step-by-step guide on how to do this. Thank you!

entry.title: Story Reports not working after Importing from PROD
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am trying to export the Story Report from Test to PROD. Some reports are not working correctly. While updating the filters resolves the issue for some reports, others still do not work. Has anyone experienced a similar situation and found a solution?

Thank you,

Dipti

entry.title: KPI selection button disable
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

anyone can advise me why selection button disable in KPI selection dropdown list for some users in PMGM ?

some users not able to select KPI category due to to selection button disable

entry.title: Absence Quota Generation after 7 hours of overtime on time evaluation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a requirement for automatic generation of Absence Quota Type 02 when the employee has worked overtime for 7 hours. I have checked the IMG for Generation Rules for Quota Type Selection and have some question about this configuration

1. How do i set the minimum hours worked before the quota is generated? i tried to look around but didn't find any field that indicate the minimum time balance needed.

2. How do i set the validity from of the quota as the generation date and the validity end as +3 after the generation date? i'm guessing the option would be transfer time but i want to make sure what's the differences between accrual period and transfer time

The use-case would be like this :

- On 24.09.2024 if the employee have a minimum of 7 hours overtime, the time evaluation will generate 1 Day of absence quota with validity date 24.09.2024-24.12.2024

Thanks and regard, Kelvin
